case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORP. vs. YOUNG, JOHN JR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORP. SERVED SEP-28-2001, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, JOHN JR.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $920.92 INTEREST, $35.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORP.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORP.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. A WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON NOVEMBER 5, 2001, IF NO MOTION IS FILED BY DEFENDANT.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, JOHN JR.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, JOHN JR. $978.35 PRINCIPAL, $941.63 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,942.98, THIS IS A RENEWAL OF OLD #069509.
